form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months in a small field at this track 3yo Hcp 62+ on April 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Snitzalatte carrying 57kg at $19. Previously second-up 6th of 10 at this track 3yo Plate on October 18 over 1400m, 3 len behind Rubens' Ceiling carrying 58kg at $21. Rates highly and should improve.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 1.1 len at Pinjarra Cl1 March 22 over 1200m defeating Setagaya carrying 59kg at $7. The run before that won by 0.8 len at this track 3yo Mdn March 11 over 1000m defeating Mamma Says So carrying 57kg at $5. Chasing the hat-trick and can extend his winning ways.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 4th of 10 at Pinjarra Cl3 on March 22 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Just Gifted carrying 59kg at $3. Previously second-up 4th of 8 at Belmont Park 3yo Plate on September 13 over 1200m, slow going 1.2 len behind Swingman carrying 56kg at $10. Winkers go back on now and she'll have improved plenty for the fresh effort.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at this track Cl3 October 15 over 1000m, 3 len behind Elite Beau carrying 57.5kg at $13. Previously first up; third of 8 at Northam 2yo 0Mw July 16 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Riva Aquarama with 56kg at $9.50. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation fourth of 13 at this track in the G2 Wa Guineas November 22 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind King Of Light carrying 55kg at $26. On debut won by 1.75 len Belmont Park 3yo 0Mwly October 22 over 1000m slow track defeating Tennessee Spirit carrying 57.5kg at $5. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Looks a very exciting filly on resumption and can return on a winning note.

form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. Last start 4th of 9 at this track Cl1 on March 11 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Slip The Jab with 59kg at $6. Before that 5th of 8 at this track 3yo Hcp 62+ on February 21 over 1000m, 4 len behind Watto's Mark carrying 54kg at $21. Encouraging effort last start. Can feature with the rise in trip.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign when last of 11 at this track in the LR Burgess Queen November 4 over 1400m, 6 len behind Playin'it Sweet carrying 55kg at $41. Previously first up; third of 8 at Belmont Park 3yo Plate September 13 over 1200m, soft track; 0.7 len behind Swingman with 56kg at $2.45. Tested in stronger company at the end of last campaign and she can resume on a positive note.
